subject: DevOps
title: DevOps in Regulated Industries
description: A quick win: understand DevOps in Regulated Industries.

hook.text: Banks deploy once a quarter. Hospitals need FDA approval. Can DevOps work in regulated industries?

buildup.text: Regulation demands audit trails, change approvals, and compliance checks. This sounds anti-DevOps.

discovery.text: Automation solves it. Automated compliance checks, audit logs in Git, and policy-as-code satisfy auditors.

twist.text: Capital One, a bank, deploys thousands of times a day. Compliance is baked into the pipeline, not bolted on.

climax.text: Regulated DevOps is harder to set up but pays off enormously. Faster releases with full traceability.

punchline.text: Regulation and DevOps coexist. Automate the compliance.

quiz.question: How does DevOps handle compliance in regulated industries?
options: By automating compliance checks and baking them into the pipeline
